description: EXAMPLE issue list — copy this to ../issues_final.json and REWRITE the issues for YOUR topic. Each in-scope paper is scored 0-3 for DEPTH OF ENGAGEMENT on each issue. This is NOT a partition: a paper may load on several issues. The per-issue `weight` is used only by build_lit_table.py to compute weighted leverage; it does not affect the 0-3 scoring. Up-weight the issues most central to your thesis; down-weight peripheral ones; leave at 1.0 if unsure. (This example uses a made-up topic — 'the ethics of self-tracking / personal data' — purely to show the shape.)

depth_scale.0: absent — does not engage this issue
depth_scale.3: central — a core thesis or organizing concern of the paper

issues.label: Autonomy and self-knowledge
issues.question: Does self-tracking enhance or undermine autonomy and accurate self-knowledge?

issues.label: Privacy and third-party data
issues.question: What privacy obligations arise when self-tracked data is shared with platforms, employers, or insurers?

issues.label: Quantification and value
issues.question: Does reducing aspects of a life to metrics distort what is valuable about them?
